name: ON24 Webinar and Digital Experience API
what_it_does: ON24 REST API for B2B webinar and digital experience platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve webinar registration and attendance data, access engagement analytics, manage audience data, and integrate ON24 event intelligence into CRM and marketing automation workflows. ON24 specializes in B2B demand generation webinars with deep analytics on audience engagement.
use_cases: Retrieving webinar registration and attendance data from marketing automation agents
Accessing audience engagement scores from demand generation analytics agents
Integrating ON24 lead data into CRM and marketing nurture workflow agents
Managing webinar audience data for post-event segmentation agents
not_for: Internal all-hands events (ON24 is B2B demand gen focused)
best_when: A B2B marketing team using ON24 for demand generation webinars wants AI agents to extract audience engagement data, route qualified leads to CRM, and integrate event intelligence into marketing automation.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Webinar attendee data and engagement tracking are personal data. GDPR compliance required. Lead data from webinars requires appropriate consent.

auth.notes: ON24 API uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials grant. Client ID and secret from ON24 partner portal. Enterprise access required.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only B2B platform. Pricing negotiated with ON24 sales.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per client; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Webinar attendee data and engagement tracking requires GDPR consent
No public MCP server — enterprise OAuth2 REST API integration required
API documentation not publicly available — enterprise customers only
ON24 engagement data (polls, Q&A, resource downloads) is proprietary format
Lead scoring data from ON24 is valuable but requires mapping to CRM fields
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: B2B webinar attendee PII and engagement data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 client credentials. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Webinar attendee PII and engagement data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 client credentials.
